description: Minimalistic ragdoll fighting game created in 7 days. Only play this game if you're curious where Drunken Wrestlers 2 came from, or feeling nostalgic.

name: Lively Chair Simulator
description: Lively Chair Simulator is an indie multiplayer game with strange controls. Let’s see if you are suitable to be a chair.

name: Purgo box
description: This game is an online multiplayer game created in RPG Tutool. Collect items, increase the heroine's sensitivity, and aim for the ending.

name: Pixel Paint Together 🖌️
description: A relaxing color by numbers game! Color with your friends! Lots to paint! No hidden fees!

name: CastingPlz
description: CastingPlz is a 2-player cooperative roguelike game where players take on the roles of two characters with distinct responsibilities: one for attacking and the other for movement.

name: Cat Warfare
description: Cat Warfare is a multiplayer first person shooter that lets you take the place of a cat out for revenge, blood and glory.
notes: Có DLC trả phí; Anti-Cheat Toolkit [Non-Kernel]

name: Qwilight
description: Qwilight은 현존하는 리듬 게임 중 가장 많은 기능을 가진 무료 BMS, BMSON 구동기입니다. 다양한 게임 모드, 다양한 하드웨어, 풍부한 온라인 기능, BMS는 입문하기 어렵다는 고정 관념을 깨는 뛰어난 접근성 등을 자랑합니다. 또한, 게임 내 도전 과제와 프로필의 호칭은 공식 디스코드에서 제안하면 추가되는 커뮤니티 기반 콘텐츠도 제공됩니다.

name: Rapid Tap
description: Enjoy a fun, grid tapping game that gets faster the more you play. See how long you can last tapping the flashing buttons. Now with a bunch of fun skins!

name: Splitgate
description: Splitgate is a free-to-play, fast-paced multiplayer shooter that features player-controlled portals. This sci-fi shooter takes the FPS genre to a new dimension with its portal mechanics, delivering high-flying, multi-dimensional combat.

name: Planet S
description: Planet S is a real-time strategy game where your goal is to colonize multiple planets in a solar system to advance your civilization, build a city and supply it to grow your faction.

name: Graphwar
description: Graphwar is an artillery game in which you must hit your enemies using mathematical functions. The trajectory of your shot is determined by the function you wrote, and your goal is to avoid the obstacles and your teammates and hit your enemies. The game takes place in a Cartesian Plane.

name: Grabity
description: Dance the tango of death in Grabity, a fast-paced, physics-based arena brawler. Combat robots duke it out using Grab guns to turn nearby objects into lethal projectiles or makeshift shields in intense tactical throw-downs.

name: DAMNOSAUR
description: DAMNOSAUR is a chaotic arcade shooter that combines colourful anime with the Dino-apocalypse! Fight alone, or with a friend to take down these monstrous dinosaurs.

name: Goblin Summer Camp
description: The one true multiplayer goblin simulator. Play Goblin Tag and acquire power ups that let you leap across the entire map. Play Hide and Seek and annoy your friends with ‘REEEES’ when they cant find you. Stay alive in Death Run without being trapped. Be a goblin and do goblin things!

name: Balance 97.261/100
description: A patient person, who uses his hands to adjust the world.

name: Haha Doodle
description: Play drawing games online with your friends, for FREE!

name: Galactic Lander
description: Inspired by the classic arcade Lunar Lander game, in Galactic Lander you control a delicate scientific spaceship which you must deliver from point A to point B, either alone, or with a friend in a co-op level, potentially made by the game's own Steam Workshop community!

name: Super Galaxy Ball
description: A 3D Platformer set in space with 40+ levels and a built-in level editor. Race for the fastest times in campaign or custom levels either by yourself or with your friends online.

name: Last Slice
description: Last Slice is an action brawler where pizza has special abilities! In the campaign you deliver pizzas, and beat up anyone who stands in the way. In multiplayer, fight over the last slice of pizza with up to six people.

name: Wequer
description: Chess has evolved! Hatch units from eggs, make ranged attacks, cast dastardly spells, and take control of the board to win in Wequer.

name: TrackMania Nations Forever
description: A free game in the truest sense of the word, TrackMania Nations Forever lets you drive at mind-blowing speeds on fun and spectacular tracks in solo and multiplayer modes.TrackMania Nations Forever offers a new "Forever" version of the Stadium environment, a solid solo mode and 65 brand new, progressively challenging tracks.

name: The one who pulls out the sword will be crowned king
description: Are you The Rightful King™ or just a filthy peasant? The sword is waiting for you to lift it, but it gets longer and heavier each time someone else succeeds...

name: Vampire's Fall 2
description: Rise as a vampire in a handcrafted 2D dark-fantasy RPG. Master devastating powers, confront horrific enemies, and forge your destiny in a world shattered by a brutal civil war between humans and vampires.

name: SYNTHETIK: Arena
description: Face the varied challenges of the Machine God Zir in ARENA, a standalone expansion for Synthetik: Legion Rising! Leverage the next level in gun-play and experiment with powerful tech in varied action packed Arenas!

name: Oh...Sir! Prototype
description: A Ridiculous local 1v1muliplayer Insult Simulator for two!

name: Hamster Hustle
description: A fast-paced, chaotic multiplayer party game where being 'it' is the last thing you want-dodge, dash, and push to avoid getting tagged!

name: b 2
description: b 2: online-only multiplayer --- an alien place --- you are the bee: fly where you want, play as you like

name: Kitty Ball
description: Take control of a cat and invite your friends to participate in this amazing multiplayer match where you will have to be the fastest and smartest to unwind your ball of yarn first! Don't let the others outrun you because only one of you will have the chance to lift the Gold Cup 😺🏆

name: Counter Agents
description: Counter Agents is a spy-themed, head-to-head multiplayer game where your objective is to sneak around guards, steal the briefcase, and make it to an exit point before your opponent!

name: Air Attack
description: Take a 5 minute break to de-stress with this high-intensity, ultra simple, retro arcade shooter! Take down airplanes. Dig tunnels. Hide and seek shelter. Try and beat the highscore. That's all. Afterwards, you will go back to your life with renewed energy of body and mind.

name: Unchained
description: Unchained is a fast paced retro multiplayer first person shooter in which you can compete in different game modes and maps, using a large arsenal of unique and deadly weapons (And some cool powerups too) to defeat your enemies.

name: Banana Shooter
description: Dave is the banana man who is keep shooting enemies and get their banana,and use some cool mechanic such as dash,double jump,grapple hook and rocket jump.If you are finding fast paced shooter game,this is what you need

name: Paunch
description: One-on-one physical online duels.

name: Knightfall: A Daring Journey
description: Two knights, a strong bond, and a long journey. Take up the race for the rose, ride from town to town and take shelter before nightfall by any means necessary! If your bond is strong and your horse drifts well, you can be the recipient of the fabled rose. Luckily you brought guns!

name: Strawberry Chocolate
description: Strawberry chocolate" is a "Bang Dream" Doujin Game. It's a pixel style RPG, Players will operate Anon and Taki in different game worlds to carry out crazy adventures, and the cute and loving interaction between the two is the game's greatest charm ......

name: 雛ちゃんブレイカー2ndBreak
description: 再びあばら家に立てこもり、守りを強固に固めた雛ちゃん！ 家やオブジェクトごと吹っ飛ばして勝利を掴もう！ 1対1のオンライン対戦ゲーム！

name: Monday Meltdown
description: Fast. Bloody. 8-Player Mayhem. Dominate. Taunt. Repeat. Free. No strings attached. Ever.

name: Crashphalt
description: Pound your way to victory in this 4-player competitive platformer. Create massive shockwaves in the terrain to bounce your enemies off the stage while trying to avoid being sent flying yourself.

name: Sven Co-op
description: Sven Co-op is a co-operative game originally based around Valve Software's Half-Life. In this game players must work together against computer controlled enemies and solve puzzles as a team.

name: Double Action: Boogaloo
description: Double Action is a free stylish multiplayer game about diving, flipping, and sliding your way into action movie mayhem.

name: Relic Hunters Zero: Remix
description: Relic Hunters Zero: Remix is a remaster of the FREE 1 million player hit game about blasting evil space ducks and turtles with tiny cute guns. It’s fast, it’s tactical, and feels deliciously smooth to play. Unlock new weapons, characters and relics to defeat the Ducan Commander!

name: Frog Fighters
description: Frog Fighters is a light-hearted, fast-paced, third-person-shooter where you become a frog on a lily pad with an ability to shoot other flying frogs with different types of laser-leafs.

name: 荣耀斗罗
description: 百变个性外形，多样养成策略，畅享热血战斗，体验超能者的都市传说！玩荣耀斗罗，加Outpop1102（VX），领20元现金！

name: 决战沙城
description: 《决战沙城》是一款自由打装备免氪金的传奇对战游戏，以其独特的游戏玩法和丰富多样的内容，吸引了众多玩家的关注。在游戏中，你将进入一个充满挑战和竞争的世界，与其他玩家展开激烈的对战，争夺珍贵的装备和资源，成为传奇战士的最终王者。快来加入这个充满挑战和竞争的游戏，展现你的实力，成为传奇战士的最终王者吧!

name: Freight Hopper
description: Welcome to the world of Freight Hopper. A high-octane first-person parkour experience. Test your spontaneous planning and reach the goal as fast as possible!

name: Catch Me If You Can
description: Chase your friends in this heart-racing "Tag" based game. Use a grappling hook and bouncy physics to your advantage. Features proximity voice chat.

name: Waves 2: Notorious
description: Waves 2: Notorious is an arcade twin-stick shooter set in Cyberspace. Build Combos, earn Adrenaline and unleash powerful Burst attacks as you Dive into the Net and do battle against an AI that adapts to your weaknesses!

name: Wonder Wickets
description: A colorful and whimsical minigolf-inspired game set in outer space, featuring tons of unique content, game modes, challenges, a diverse cast of characters, and special abilities to create amazing shots!

name: Nanika Game Online
description: Choose from a variety of “Nanika,” each with unique skills, and build your very own original deck to challenge other players. Merge identical Nanika to evolve them, master the perfect timing for skill activation, and aim for victory!

name: Muscle Magic
description: Muscle Magic is a local multiplayer brawler in which you play as powerful, muscular wizards and barrage your opponents with a variety of wacky spells. Grab up to 3 of your friends and duke it out to see who is truly the fittest mage of them all!

name: Altitude
description: Now Available on PC, Mac and Linux!

name: Mad Adventures
description: Work together or betray each other! Unlock lobby-wide upgrades. Survive a 4-day expedition to reach the final boss. A Multiplayer 3D Platformer with a sprinkle of Roguelike and Battle Royale!

name: Chess Evolved Online
description: secretly the most overpowered game in existence

name: SlapBR
description: SlapBR is a simplistic, horror battle royale. You can compete with friends, create and join rooms, and become terrified as you hide-slap-block your way to victory.

name: Vacuum Pilot
description: Vacuum Pilot is a 2D speedrunning game with easy to learn but hard to master controls based on mouse movement.

name: 狂神无双
description: 仙侠类次时代MMORPG游戏，加Outpop1102，领20元红包~

name: UniBall
description: One of the longest running independent games on the Internet, UniBall has evolved from a simple version of space hockey into an online multiplayer e-sport that is uniquely its own.

name: Slipstream: Rogue Space
description: A multiplayer roguelike about teamwork, survival...and cute animals in space! Play with a few friends or join a streamer's crew of dozens as you work together to battle aliens across the vast Rogue Space.

name: My Slime Garden
description: Raise, nurture, and breed adorable slimes in a relaxing adventure where each slime is unique! Mix traits to create new slime companions and explore endless islands filled with secrets and surprises. Your perfect slime squad is waiting—how far can they go?

name: Bass Monkey
description: Bass Monkey is a free Hack and Slash arcade game. Up to 4 friends can compete (or co-operate!) in this short, low-stress, musical platformer. Collect bananas, smack away hamsters, and try to get on the high score leaderboards as you battle through a 5 song EP.

name: Bamerang: Warm-Up Duel
description: Warm up your boomerang throwing skills in the free duel mode of Bämeräng, the fast paced boomerang fighting game. Fight for the favor of the goddess in an outlandish, colorful world in this local multiplayer game.

name: Moonrakers: Luminor
description: A fully-cooperative game mode for the board game Moonrakers. Introducing a co-op game mode for 1-5 players where you'll adventure across a procedurally generated map, attempt multi-tiered narrative-driven contracts, build a ship, and face off against a Utopian Alliance General.

name: In Sink: A Co-Op Escape Prologue
description: Play an early version of the first level for free! Work together to solve the puzzles and escape a desert island in this multiplayer co-op adventure. Success requires more than just you and your partner thinking alike - you'll have to communicate and stay In Sink to overcome the challenges ahead.

name: Marbles on Stream
description: Marbles on Stream is a Marble Racing game for EVERYONE! You can simulate races yourself or stream it on Twitch.tv with your viewers! Many features in game to help interact with your viewers and engage with them in unique ways. 3 ways to play! Download and stream! Download the MoS app on your mobile device! Get on Twitch.

name: Istrolid
description: In Istrolid you design your own unique spaceships from a large number of parts to fit your strategy and play style. With no set units or factions you are free to create a fleet where each ship has its own balanced strengths and weaknesses, from basic fighters and bombers to hulking battleships and speedy destroyers.

name: Battle Ball
description: Battle Ball is a goofy online multiplayer game. Play with your team in a 3 v 3 game of loose-rules dodgeball meets twin-stick shooter. Play with your friends or knock them out by teaming up with random players!

name: Meridian 59
description: Meridian 59 was the first 3D massively multiplayer game, released in 1996. It's back, and it's free to play!

name: Temperia: Soul of Majestic
description: Temperia: Soul of Majestic is strategic competitive online card game. Quick, strategic and totally open-handed, every match is different from others thanks to the abilities of the creatures, the equipment, the powers and the elemental spaces presented in the board.

name: FEWAR-DVD
description: A rapid arcade game. Avoid the swords. Find the key. Enter the portal. It's a migraine.

name: Werewolves Revenge
description: An immersive, player-driven social deduction game for 8-16 players.

name: Touhou Block Fall ~ Yukari
description: Reimu and Yukari team up in this puzzle game inspired by classic 8-bit Nintendo games. Manage the incoming youkai so Yukari can gap them away!

name: Tombstone Tally
description: Tombstone Tally is a cross between bingo and a scavenger hunt where you check off squares based on ridiculous tombstones. Play with your friends! Smack them around with a shovel and challenge them on three maps, including a fast paced arena mode!

name: Meteora's Mystic Merge
description: Meteora's Mystic Merge is a puzzle game based on the famous Suika game but with abilities added on top. Instead of fruits it uses a variety of vtubers as assets. Combine two characters to slowly get to the final one.

name: Yokai Art: Survival Prologue
description: Strategically position units on a chess-based battlefield, defending territories while earning roguelike upgrade-items for leveling up. Discover over 30 unique equipment pieces that modify units, allowing for exciting customization and ensuring endless excitement and replayability.

name: Arausio
description: Explore the ancient theatre of Arausio and discover Roman antiquity in this narrative exploration game!

name: Transmissions: Element 120
description: TE120 is a short single player experience set in the Half-Life Universe featuring a gravity defying weapon that allows you to jump buildings and sustain large falls. The story takes place at a mysterious date & location. Where are you? Why have you been sent?

name: Soda Dungeon
description: Pop the top on some legendary action with Soda Dungeon, the fresh and fizzy hit mobile RPG adventure, now available on your desktop! Manage your team as you raid the local dungeons, upgrade your tavern, and attract new party members. Gold, legendary items, and more await you.

name: Your Dry Delight
description: Set in 1920s Prohibition-era America, this romantic comedy follows Detective Richter and his adventures as he attempts to unravel Cleveland's liquor industry.

name: Ark Re:Code
description: The end is here and it’s horny… Dive into a wild post-apocalyptic RPG packed with sexy girls, mutants, and more H-scenes than you can handle. Build your harem and fuck these hotties like the fate of humanity depends on it!

name: DDNet
description: Want to play the hardest cooperative 2D platformer ever? Want to finish no map ever? Want to be in pain for hours and cry, getting nothing in return? Come play DDNet with a large community of other sufferers!

name: Upload Labs
description: A sci-fi management game where you build and optimize your computer's system from the ground up. Connect and configure interconnected nodes to efficiently download, process, and upload files. Manage your setup, solve system challenges, and become the ultimate system architect

name: MLB 9 Innings Rivals 26
description: Take your rivalries to the next level in MLB 9 Innings Rivals 26!

name: Paladins®
description: Paladins is the ultimate fantasy team-based shooter experience, with over 50 customizable Champions fighting in 5v5 action across a diverse Realm of modes and maps!

name: Stay Out
description: Stay Out - is a MMORPG with shooter elements, based on spirit of “stalking” - an urban exploration, searching and exploring mysterious, abandoned and forgotten by humanity pieces of our planet.

name: Catan Universe
description: Trade – build – settle: Become Lord of Catan! Get to know Catan and play the starter scenario in multiplayer mode. Purchase the complete base game, expansions, card game and much more to discover the entire Universe of Catan.

name: Evitania Online - Idle RPG
description: Online Idle RPG with an open world without the grind of classic MMORPGs. Collect rare loot, develop your character, master professions, craft powerful gear, and defeat challenging bosses as you progress endlessly.

name: MU: Dark Epoch
description: MU: Dark Epoch is a fantasy MMORPG mobile game that combines high quality, fast-paced gameplay, and innovative features. As the best MU instalment in the series by far, it offers impressive dynamic costumes and stunning graphic performance. Log in now and win the Archangel Set!

name: Relic Arena
description: Relic Arena is an 8-player free-to-play autobattler by Dota 2 personalities SUNSfan and Jenkins. Equip heroes with historical relics, that provide unique abilities and upgrades, under the command of legendary historical figures such as Cleopatra and Harambe.

name: Drift Legends 2
description: Arcade drifting with 50+ dream cars, from JDM icons to American Muscle. Master the art of the drift in a huge career, then dominate the competition in cross-platform online battles. Your legend begins now—no high-end PC required.

name: Baldi's Basics Classic Remastered
description: Escape Baldi's schoolhouse again in this new remastered version of Baldi's Basics Classic! Use stealth and strategy to collect all 7 notebooks and win! Featuring three games in one, gameplay improvements, a more authentic art style, accessibility improvements, and brand new ways to play!

name: Amazons vs Zombies 🔞
description: Lead a squad of elite Amazons in a post-apocalyptic tactical action RPG. Battle hordes of mutated weirdos, recruit and upgrade unique heroines, and uncover the truth behind Virus G in a story-driven survival adventure.

name: FPS Chess
description: Battle a friend in this fast paced 1v1 class-based first-person shooter. Chess takes a back-seat to FPS as you win duel after duel and capture the opponent's pieces until you've beaten their king and won the game.

name: Shadow Fight Arena
description: Shadow Fight Arena is a fighting game in which you will take part in an epic Shadow Tournament. Choose your Hero and prove what you are capable of!

name: Toram Online
description: The MMORPG of a massive and magnificent fantasy! Let's explore the MMO world!

name: PlanetSide 2
description: PlanetSide 2 is an all-out planetary war, where thousands of players battle as one across enormous continents. Utilize infantry, ground and air vehicles, and teamwork to destroy your enemies in this revolutionary first-person shooter on a massive scale.

name: Might & Magic Fates - Heroes TCG
description: Might & Magic Fates TCG is an original card battle game where you command Heroes, summon iconic creatures, cast devastating spells, and build tactical structures. Collect tons of cards, build unique decks and crush rivals in epic duels to become a legend of the Sea of Fates.

name: Infinity Kingdom
description: Conquer the city, discover the Infinity! Infinity Kingdom is a cartoon-style mmo strategy game. As a resourceful lord, you must defend the land of Norheim against the evil gnomes while protecting yourself from other invading players!

name: Pinball FX
description: Pinball FX is digital pinball evolved. Get the highest score on tables inspired by the biggest brands in entertainment. New tables arrive frequently!

Customize your load-out with stands, blinds and dogs. Play alone or in multiplayer with up to 7 friends.

name: Battle Nations
description: Battle Nations is back! Build your empire and lead your armies to victory! Choose from traditional troops and vehicles or unleash exotic forces like mammoths, velociraptors, sandworms, and futuristic plasma units!

name: A.V.A Global
description: A.V.A is a classic FPS shooter game featuring various types game Modes. Depending on the battlefield, you can choose Pointman, Rifleman, and Sniper and enjoy strategic team play.

name: SIGame
description: Exciting quiz game where you can test your knowledge, compete with friends and smart bots, and explore a variety of topics!

name: Super Sus
description: Welcome to join the multiplayer social deduction game - Super Sus! Engage in intense gameplay with global players, as you strategize to safeguard your spaceship from the cunning Impostors determined to sabotage the mission and eliminate everyone aboard!

name: Kinky Cats 🔞
description: Kinky Cats is a hot merge game in which you can collect cards and cast sexy babes. Help horny girls unlock their potential, and they will make all your dirty dreams come true!

name: MechWarrior Online™ Legends
description: MechWarrior Online™ Legends is a tactical, 'Mech-based online shooter set in the vast BattleTech Universe. Assume the role of an elite MechWarrior, piloting powerful BattleMechs, fighting for supremacy over the Inner Sphere.

name: World War Legion
description: Join fast-paced World War 2 action-packed combat. Play World War Legion -- AAA experience on any hardware. Best-in-class multiplayer gunfight. WW2 weapons gunsmith. Next-level extreme performance. Lightning-speed loading time and a whole lot more.

name: Town of Salem 2
description: A multiplayer online social deduction game for 7–15 players. Use deception, strategy, and teamwork to find the truth—or get away with murder.

name: 造梦西游：无双
description: Journey to the West: Unparalleled "is an adventure RPG based on the theme of Journey to the West. It tells the story of seven demon kings causing chaos, and Wukong adventuring to defeat them and protect Dongsheng Shenzhou.

name: Will To Live Online
description: Will To Live is a MMORPG-shooter whose action takes place in a severe post-apocalyptic world. Explore the world, engage in fights with mutants and other survivors, join the clans in the struggle for existence and prove your right to Live.

name: Yurei: Ink of the Damned

name: Hamster’s Sticker Book
description: Decorate your desktop with cute stickers! A desktop overlay sticker book where you can freely attach and remove stickers on your screen while working.

name: Cyber Units
description: Generate. Upgrade. Optimize. Build an infinite production protocol in a futuristic incremental experience where every click fuels exponential growth.

name: Forestress Shade
description: Forestress Shade is a strategy puzzle game that combines roguelike elements with chess. Command, battle, win, and acquire new animals. Control your animal army, defeat the approaching enemies, and venture to the edge of the deadshade forest.

name: Titan Core
description: A free-to-play card battler that’s truly fair—no pay-to-win nonsense. The only randomness? The cards you draw. Everything else comes down to strategy.

name: Cave Crashers
description: Cave Crashers is a top-down arcade shooter game where two players take control of star-nosed moles, and cooperate to pilot a mining rig through bug infested caves. Progress as far as you can, collect valuable shards to increase your score while defending your RIG from bugs using your turrets.

description: Follow a recluse who is the only being left in the world as she struggles with little things in her everyday life. This game was made entirely out of scanned traditional watercolor art.

name: Onmyoji
description: Onmyoji is a turn-based fantasy strategy game with PVP or PVE battles, where you can strengthen your beloved shikigami to build your dream tactical team and defeat various demons to become the ultimate onmyoji. Cross-platform play available for both Steam and English mobile versions.

name: Totally Accurate Battlegrounds
description: Grab your balloon crossbow and trusty inflatable hammer, because things are about to get wobbly! Be the last weirdo standing in the world-leading physics-based Battle Royale game.

name: HD Poker: Texas Hold'em
description: HD Poker - The High Def Poker experience! Crush the competition with the newest FREE poker game.

name: World of Guns: Gun Disassembly
description: World of Guns: Gun Disassembly lets you delve into the inner workings of guns from the largest gears to the smallest screws

name: Bloons TD Battles
description: Go head to head with other players in a Bloon-popping battle for victory. From the creators of best-selling Bloons TD 6, this all new Battles game is specially designed for multiplayer combat, featuring the ability to control bloons directly and send them charging past your opponent's defenses.

name: Dungeon Defenders II
description: Dungeon Defenders II is a cooperative Action Tower Defense game packed with roleplaying elements like loot, leveling, and pets.

name: Delivery & Beyond
description: No packages? No problem! Break in. Scrap everything. Deliver... A chaotic online co-op game for up to 5 players (or 15 if you really want to)!

name: 月圆之夜 (Night of Full Moon)
description: "Night of the Full Moon" is a stand-alone roguelike card game. Take adventure into Black Forest. Random event, random plot leads to different endings.

name: Prominence Poker
description: Welcome to Prominence Poker, a card game that pits players from around the world against each other – and devious AI – to build the rep, prestige, and bankroll needed to be, and beat, the best of the best.

name: Granado Espada
description: Granado Espada, the long-standing MMORPG beloved in dozens of countries around the world for its unique control system that allows you to take the role of up to 3 different characters simultaneously! Now available in English to Southeast Asia players, from imcgames.

name: Idle Clans
description: Idle Clans is a multiplayer idle game that combines the classic MMORPG experience with simplified gameplay and less time commitment. Features include a player-driven economy, PvE, trading, quests, crafting and opportunities to play, socialize and collaborate with other players.

name: Avakin Life
description: Avakin Life is an endless social world waiting for you. Live your dream life, from unique and customizable avatars to stylish fashion outfits and personalized dream homes. Hang out with friends, join parties, and embark on adventures in a world where you are in control of everything.

name: Arrow a Row
description: Arrow a row is a game in which you shoot arrows (of course) in a row! or maybe two rows! (maybe three?) Choose your power-ups and defeat the Boss.

name: Black Squad
description: Black Squad is a free-to-play military first-person-shooter. Players can master their skills and show off their strategies with a wide range of game maps, modes, and weapons to choose from. Join thousands of FPS players worldwide in one of the most played games on Steam!

name: Synergism
description: Synergism is a free-to-play Idle game about... well, Synergy! Explore that concept through hundreds of upgrades, many reset layers and probably thousands of hours of content that allows both idle and active play.
publisher: PLATONIC AND KHAFRA IDLE GAMES OF SYNERGISM AND ULTIMATE PROGRESS BAR LLC

name: Faaast Penguin
description: Welcome to a wild penguin vacation! Faaast Penguin is a free-to-play game featuring exhilarating survival races with up to 40 players battling it out in the rankings, as well as co-op mountain climbing where 1-4 players aim for the summit. Be a penguin and play with people worldwide!

name: TCG Card Shop Simulator: Prologue
description: Open your local game store early with the Prologue version, which includes main gameplay of the full version, but with limited progression. Stock shelves with booster packs, or crack them and collect the cards for yourself. Set your own prices, sell cards to customer.

name: Shelter 69 🔞[ADULT NSFW]

name: Idle Wizard
description: RPG/Idle hybrid about becoming the most powerful wizard there is. Pick a class, get a pet, configure and improve your character in a myriad ways!

name: Karos

name: Bloons Monkey City
description: Create, upgrade, and customize your very own Bloons Monkey City in this groundbreaking blend of city building and tower defense awesomeness!

name: Electoral Carnage
description: Electoral Carnage is an absurd 2D fighting game featuring America's most famous (and infamous) politicians. If you don't download it you hate America. Also JFK can assassinate himself. What more do you need to know?

name: Bouncemasters
description: Launch a penguin across the globe! Whack, bounce, and soar through crazy obstacles in this fun physics-based arcade game, inspired by the legendary YetiSports! Escape the North Pole and find love - or just keep failing hilariously.

name: Idle Cave Miner
description: Idle Cave Miner is an idle game about crafting items, mining gems, and building your team of miners. Prestige, craft, and travel to other mines to increase your strength to dig deeper, and find what lurks below.

name: Ninja Kiwi Archive
description: Enjoy some of the best loved Flash games of the past in this awesome time capsule of over 60 Ninja Kiwi classics. Experience a piece of history and play the original Flash games that spawned the worldwide phenomenon of Bloons TD.

name: Buy a Croquette!
description: March 2012, Nagano. The brave and clever high school girl, Chio Aozora, is facing a major crisis: she doesn’t have enough money to buy a croquette! Navigate through the streets and alleys of Nagano, interact with a variety of characters, solve complex puzzles, collect 380 yen, and buy a croquette!

name: PickCrafter
description: Conquer PickCrafter, the hit indie idle game! Break blocks, forge equipment, and collect powerful Pickaxes. Prestige to legendary tiers with the new Ascension Skill Tree. Discover biomes and battle epic bosses. Make meaningful choices and invent complex builds in this addictive endless adventure!

name: 2025: Mosaic Retrospective
description: 2025: Mosaic Retrospective is a picross/minesweeper hybrid featuring a single ENORMOUS puzzle inspired by global news stories from throughout the year.

name: Cave Crawlers
description: Cave Crawlers is a 1-10 player rogue lite set deep underground in a system of randomly generated caves. Players use weapons, spells, and talents to defeat the unique bosses and enemies found in each biome.

name: Otherworld Legends
description: A "blood-pumping, face-bashing" roguelike brawler. Master heroes of your choice, craft uniquely broken builds, and hack & pummel through a myriad of dungeons in a thrilling rampage.
